run_input.name: Run input
run_input.description: System collection containing the run input payload.

sources.name: Sources
sources.description: Verified sources (e.g. articles, docs). The url field must be a URL the agent has actually retrieved or opened, not invented. Use citations/derived_from on other kinds to point to these.

url.description: URL that has been verified (retrieved or opened); do not invent.

citations.description: Sources for this item: external (url + title) or internal (item_ref to another collection item). Use for every claim or decision so outputs are traceable to sources.

items.description: One citation: either external source (url) or reference to another collection item (item_ref).

url.description: External source URL (only if you actually retrieved or opened it; do not invent).

item_ref.description: Reference to another collection item in this run (kind + item_id).

item_id.description: Id of the item in that collection.

derived_from.description: Chain of thinking: collection items this was derived from (kind + item_id). Enables tracing why this conclusion was reached.

kind.description: Collection kind of the source item.

item_id.description: Id of the item this was derived from.

reasoning.description: Optional short explanation of why this was decided or how it was derived (chain of thought). Supports traceability.

summary.name: Summary
summary.description: Synthesized summary derived from sources. Use Markdown for content.

citations.description: Sources for this item: external (url + title) or internal (item_ref to another collection item). Use for every claim or decision so outputs are traceable to sources.

items.description: One citation: either external source (url) or reference to another collection item (item_ref).

url.description: External source URL (only if you actually retrieved or opened it; do not invent).

item_ref.description: Reference to another collection item in this run (kind + item_id).

item_id.description: Id of the item in that collection.

derived_from.description: Chain of thinking: collection items this was derived from (kind + item_id). Enables tracing why this conclusion was reached.

kind.description: Collection kind of the source item.

item_id.description: Id of the item this was derived from.

reasoning.description: Optional short explanation of why this was decided or how it was derived (chain of thought). Supports traceability.

approved_summary.name: Approved summary
approved_summary.description: Human-approved summary. Use Markdown for content.

citations.description: Sources for this item: external (url + title) or internal (item_ref to another collection item). Use for every claim or decision so outputs are traceable to sources.

item_id.description: Id of the item in that collection.
